name: Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 1 small cucumber, peeled and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients into a container of electric blender in the order listed.
2. Cover and blend at high speed for 5-10 seconds or until the ingredients are finely chopped.
3. Chill thoroughly and serve. It may be served with side dishes of chopped cucumber, green onion, green pepper, tomatoes, and croutons.
